subject: refactor: implement agent cycling with prompt variant retry for commit generation
body:
This refactoring adds proper support for agent cycling with prompt variant retry:

- Added `lib.rs` to `ralph-workflow/src/` and `tests/` for library targets
- Implemented `build_agents_to_try()` helper for ordered agent list
- Refactored `run_commit_attempt()` to `run_commit_attempt_with_agent()`
- Type system improvements: `OutputFormat::from_str()` now uses `std::str::FromStr`
- Exported `run_with_prompt` and `PromptCommand` from pipeline module
- Updated integration tests and golden test files
- Fixed doc tests in cleaning.rs and monitoring.rs
